title: Build Real Things With Mistral AI

modules.title: What Mistral Is and Why Builders Care
modules.sub: Meet the open model giving builders back their freedom
modules.description: You get a clear-eyed look at what Mistral actually is, how it compares to closed models like GPT-4, and why its open approach matters for people who want to build without restrictions. You'll come away knowing exactly what Mistral can do and where it fits in the current AI landscape.

modules.title: Running Mistral Locally and via API
modules.sub: Get Mistral running on your machine or through the cloud
modules.description: You choose your setup path — local install or API access — and get Mistral responding to your first real queries. By the end, you have a working environment you can build on, not just a tutorial you've watched.

modules.title: Prompting Mistral for Code, Content, and Data Tasks
modules.sub: Learn to ask Mistral the right way for real results
modules.description: You practice writing prompts across three practical domains — generating code, drafting content, and extracting or transforming data — and see how small prompt changes produce very different outputs. You'll build an instinct for what works and why, not just copy-paste templates.

modules.title: Building a Mini Project with Mistral in a Day
modules.sub: Ship something real using Mistral as your AI backbone
modules.description: You pick a small project idea — a CLI tool, a content bot, a data summarizer — and build a working version of it in a single focused session using Mistral. The goal is a finished, shareable thing, not a proof of concept that lives in a notebook.

modules.title: Mistral's Limits and When to Use Something Else
modules.sub: Know when Mistral is the right tool and when it isn't
modules.description: You stress-test Mistral against tasks it struggles with — complex reasoning chains, real-time data, multimodal inputs — and learn how to recognize when a different model or approach would serve you better. You leave with honest judgment, not brand loyalty.

synopsis: You don't need Big Tech's permission to build with AI — Mistral gives you powerful open models you can run, tweak, and ship without the usual gatekeeping. This course gets you from zero to a working Mistral-powered project fast, with no fluff.
rationale: Open-weight models like Mistral are reshaping what independent builders can create without corporate API dependency, but most young adults have never heard of them — a gap that limits their technical autonomy.
learning_outcome: After this course, you can set up and query Mistral AI through its API or locally, and ship a small functional project using it as the AI backbone.
source_signals: Open source AI is the path forward
nearest_existing: Code Is Now the Easiest Part
